title: dianthus goekayi
intro: Dianthus goekayi, also known as Goekaya, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dianthus goekayi include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Dianthus goekayi often involve infusions, decoctions, or infusions of the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or topical applications.
